metadata.title: DJOX BARBERSHOP | Carving confidence, cut by cut
metadata.description: Book your appointment at Djox Barbershop. Haircuts, shaves and beard grooming — tailored to your style.

hero.subtitle: Experience precision grooming and modern styles tailored to boost your confidence — in the heart of Vlasenica.

about.label: About us
about.title: Your local barbershop in Vlasenica
about.text: A small, modern shop in the heart of Vlasenica — one barber, full attention. We specialize in modern fades, precise haircuts and beard grooming. Every visit is relaxed, quick and tailored to your style.

sisanjeIzbrijavanje.name: Haircut with skin fade

uredjivanjeBrade.desc: Shaping and trimming to your style. Beard fade.

booking.metaDescription: Choose a service and time slot to book your visit at Djox Barbershop.
booking.label: Booking
booking.title: Book your appointment
booking.step1Subtitle: Pick a treatment, then we'll choose a time.
booking.pickDay: Pick a day to see available slots.
booking.closedDay: The shop is closed on that day.
booking.noSlots: No available slots for that day. Try another date.

errors.slotTaken: That time was just booked. Please choose another.

profile.ctaText: Pick a service and available slot — booking takes less than a minute.

privacyPage.title: Privacy policy
privacyPage.collectText: When you book an appointment we collect your name, email, and booking details (service, date, and time). Sign-in is handled by Clerk authentication.
privacyPage.useText: We use your data solely to manage appointments, send booking confirmations, and sync with the shop calendar. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacyPage.storageText: Booking data is stored in a secured database (Neon PostgreSQL). Only authorized shop staff can access the admin panel.
privacyPage.rightsText: You can view and cancel your appointments in My profile. To delete your account or ask about your data, contact us by phone or Instagram.
privacyPage.contactText: Djox Barbershop, Ulica 9. Januara 10, Vlasenica. Phone: +387 65 788 851.
